asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough successfully demonstrates a complex multi-agent startup diligence workflow in NodeRoom, showcasing public/private lanes and human-in-the-loop approvals with high credibility. Some UI elements are dense, but the overall flow is highly professional and relevant.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows multi-agent execution and public/private lanes, but the dense UI makes it hard to parse instantly.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the complete flow from data enrichment to private agent execution and human-in-the-loop approval.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode layout, but highly complex with multiple competing panels and logs.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with NodeRoom's core concepts of spreadsheets, agents, and trace logs.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic screen recording showing real-time agent execution, logs, and status changes.

legibility.evidence: Small font sizes in the Room Trace and chat panels reduce readability at standard sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly applicable to financial analysts and teams managing complex multi-agent workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts agent thinking states and manual approval gates rather than instant results.

observedEvidence: Room trace log with event payloads
missingEvidence: Direct integration export confirmation (e.g., actual sent email or created Notion page)

defects.observed: The Room Trace log text is very small and hard to read.
defects.fix: Increase the font size or contrast of the trace log panel for better legibility.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Run secure, multi-agent startup diligence with public and private lanes, real-time trace logs, and human-in-the-loop approval gates.
